历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1562 → 1153 → 1107 → 897 → 788, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 774 places in the past 4 years, indicating intensifying competition year by year; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 788; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 43 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 30 in 2025, gradually decreasing; the 2026 plan is 28, a further reduction of 2 (-6.7%) compared to 2025, and the reduced supply will exacerbate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (main campus), belonging to the top-tier science and engineering universities in China; the Shenzhen campus shares the main campus's disciplinary and reputation resources; disciplines include Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors (Computer Science, Communication, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, Robotics); the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; overall Douyin ranking 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising attention from applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 200,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 143,600 based on the historical proportion of about 71.8%, basically flat with a slight increase compared to 2025 (143,400); the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 is stable in the range of 336–368 points, with no significant fluctuations; the university is located in Shenzhen, Guangdong, as a branch campus, with no regional protection for local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the reduction of 2 places in the 2026 enrollment plan (reduced supply), the high Douyin heat reflecting rising attention, and the continued high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science/Electronic Information, the direction of intensifying competition is clear; however, the total number of examinees is basically flat, and there are no major positive reputation events, so the forward movement is limited. Based on the main supply-demand elasticity value of 756, combined with the above factors for a slight forward movement, the predicted minimum ranking is about 741, with a range of 652–830.

Both majors are enrolled in large categories with optional major selection mechanisms, offering high flexibility in application.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: 356 → 446 → 549 → 1272 → 601. In 2024, it dropped sharply to 1272, but rebounded to 601 in 2025, showing a V-shaped trend of decline followed by rise in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 601. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 2 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. After expansion from 2021 to 2023, it remained stable in the last three years. For 2026, no History Category data is available; it is assumed to remain at 8.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, the main campus is approximately 12th, placing it among the top universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed. On Douyin, it ranks 10th overall (high popularity), with high overall attention, but History Category has few majors and limited exposure. Business Administration is rated A (corresponding to Accounting), and Management Science and Engineering is rated A, matching the enrollment major of Economics and Management Pilot Class.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors was recommended in 2024 but showed divergence and wait-and-see in 2025. The estimated number of History Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 56,400, roughly the same as 2025 (56,300). The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch fluctuated between 400–456 points from 2021 to 2025, with 2025 at 437 points, showing no significant anomaly. The Shenzhen campus has no regional protection for Liaoning History Category candidates, with a small enrollment of 8, making rankings susceptible to fluctuations due to a few high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound of the 2025 ranking to 601, stable enrollment plan, stable total number of candidates, and divergence and wait-and-see in Accounting/Finance major popularity, it is predicted that the 2026 ranking will slightly shift backward around 601. Based on the supply-demand elasticity baseline of 601, combined with the risk of fluctuation due to divergent major popularity and small enrollment, a slight backward shift is expected, with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 611, and a range of 538–684.
